{{nihongo|'''Michino Shrine'''|道神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Etchū Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Michino Shrine'''|道神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Etchū Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Michino Shrine'''|道神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Etchū Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Michino Shrine'''|道神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Etchū Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Michino Shrine'''|道神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Etchū Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Michino Shrine'''|道神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Etchū Province]].

| native_name = 道神社
| mapframe = yes

{{nihongo|'''Michino Shrine'''|道神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Etchū Province]].
